form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Vacaciones.Reportes.NotificacionVacaciones.filter

qry:select.name: GET_FECHA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo = \'VAC\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'NOTIF\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT per02.oi_personal_emp, per02.e_numero_legajo FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as per02, VAC01_SOLICITUDES as vac01, VAC02_ESTADOS_SOL AS vac02, VAC01_NOTIF AS vac03 JOIN per02.oi_personal_emp INNER vac01.oi_personal_emp, vac01.oi_estado_solic INNER vac02.oi_estado_solic, vac01.oi_solicitud INNER vac03.oi_solicitud WHERE vac02.c_estado_solic IN (\'A\',\'L\') AND vac01.f_desde_solicitud >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@valor)} {%? ('##l_reimprime##'='0') {% AND vac03.l_notificada = \'0\' %} {% %} %} ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
